title: dryopteris lepida
intro: Dryopteris lepida, also known as the Lepidoderma fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Asian cultures for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris lepida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications.
